gazette: Official Gazette dated April 5, 2024, and numbered 32511
title: A review investigation opened for the anti-dumping measure applied to water heaters (electric, storage-type)
bodyHtml:
A review investigation has been initiated regarding the definitive anti-dumping measures applied to imports of "Others (Water Heaters - Electric, Storage-Type)" classified under customs statistical position 8516.10.80.00.19 originating from the People's Republic of China, the Italian Republic, and the Republic of Serbia.

The product under investigation is "Others (Water Heaters - Electric, Storage-Type)" classified under GTIP 8516.10.80.00.19 originating from China, Italy, and Serbia.

Concerned parties are required to submit their responses to the questionnaire and their opinions regarding the investigation within a period of 37 days.

Click here for the Notification on Prevention of Unfair Competition in Imports (No: 2024/13).
